---
title: "0 General"
format: gfm
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
message: true
warning: true
echo: true
output: true
toc: true
---

# General To Do

-   Write down equations to get to derived variables

-   Write M&M

    -   bullet points for lab

    -   complete field & greenhouse

    -   run after Morgan

# Detailed To Do

## 1. mineral N pools

## 2. PMN
